goal: Test Fighter level 5 resource abilities vs Ogre. Must exercise: (1) Normal 2-attack round (Extra Attack), (2) Second Wind bonus action when HP < 50% (heals 1d10+5, replaces with bonus action), (3) Action Surge for a 4-attack round (2 extra actions). Verify action surge gives 2 additional attack prompts and second wind resource pool is consumed. Flag if action economy allows more attacks than it should.
